image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about old friends hypothesis.
Context visual: The old friends hypothesis suggests that familiar microbes help our immune system develop better.
Escalation visual: Without exposure to these microbes, our immune system might struggle, leading to allergies and autoimmune diseases.
Evidence visual: Research shows that kids in rural areas have fewer allergies, possibly from greater microbial diversity.
Payoff visual: So, reconnecting with old friends might not just feel good, it could also be vital for our health.
Cta visual: Curious about how your environment shapes your health? Follow for more insights!
